name: Ayush Pandey
title: Postdoctoral Scholar
bio: I am a researcher in Transportation Engineering at UIUC. My work sits at the intersection of transport economics, urban traffic modeling, and urban planning. I completed my PhD at UIUC in 2025 with a focus on 'Steady-state models and multiple equilibria in transportation.' I also hold an MS from UIUC (2020) and a Bachelor of Technology in Civil Engineering from IIT Bombay (2019). My research emphasizes economic theory and novel data collection for urban movement.
